chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.111 of 2023 Maida Siddiqui Versus Awais Ali Arshad Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection/reply at “A” 2. For orders on CMA 5877/23 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA 5878/23 Dated: 19.03.2024 None present. -.-.- On the last date counsel for appellant did not attend the Court and the position today is not dissimilar. Neither appellant nor her counsel is in attendance. There is no intimation either. It seems that they have lost interest in the proceedings. Instant appeal is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
